heading: Western Area Power Administration; deposit and availability of funds related to Falcon and Amistad Dams
label: 7276g Western Area Power Administration; deposit and availability of funds related to Falcon and Amistad Dams
text: Notwithstanding the provisions of () as amended, and , all funds collected by the Western Area Power Administration from the sale of power and related services from the Falcon and Amistad Dams that are applicable to the repayment of the annual expenses of the hydroelectric facilities of these Dams and associated Western Area Power Administration activities in this and subsequent fiscal years shall be credited to this account as discretionary offsetting collections for the sole purpose of funding such expenses, with such funds remaining available until expended: , That for purposes of this appropriation, annual expenses means expenditures that are generally recovered in the same year that they are incurred.section 2 of the Act of June 18, 195468 Stat. 255section 3302 of title 31Provided further
notes: References in Text(), referred to in text, probably means section 2 of , , which is not classified to the Code.Section 2 of the Act of June 18, 195468 Stat. 255act June 18, 1954, ch. 31068 Stat. 256“This account” and “this appropriation”, referred to in text, mean funds appropriated under the heading “” of title III of the Energy and Water Development and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2010, .Falcon and Amistad Operating and Maintenance FundPub. L. 111–85

CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Energy and Water Development and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2010, and not as part of the Department of Energy Organization Act which comprises this chapter.
